description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden wardrobe with a warm brown finish and a classic, sturdy design. The front features two vertically aligned doors, each with a simple round knob handle and a lower section adorned with a grid of louvered slats, likely for ventilation. The sides and back are plain, with smooth, unadorned wooden panels. The wardrobe stands on four short legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of solid wood or wood composite, with metal hardware for the handles and hinges. This piece would be suitable for storing clothing or other personal items in an urban residential or communal setting.
description: A tall, brown wooden wardrobe with two front doors, louvered lower panels, and round knob handles. The design is classic and functional, with smooth sides and a sturdy build.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors with round knobs and louvered lower panels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, flat wooden panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a smooth, unadorned wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain wooden panel.
